'''lamala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:moale|moale]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-m-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moale|moale]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lamala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læmælæth|læmælæth]] || [[word:læmælæj|læmælæj]] || [[word:læmælæsh|læmælæsh]] || [[word:læmælæ|læmælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lamamalath|lamamalath]] || [[word:lamamalaj|lamamalaj]] || [[word:lamamalash|lamamalash]] || [[word:lamamala|lamamala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lamalath|lamalath]] || [[word:lamalaj|lamalaj]] || [[word:lamalash|lamalash]] || [[word:lamala|lamala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lamaflath|lamaflath]] || [[word:lamaflaj|lamaflaj]] || [[word:lamaflash|lamaflash]] || [[word:lamaflaf|lamaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lamalatha|lamalatha]] || [[word:lamalaja|lamalaja]] || [[word:lamalasha|lamalasha]] || [[word:lamalaka|lamalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lamalath|lamalath]] || [[word:lamalaj|lamalaj]] || [[word:lamalash|lamalash]] || [[word:lamala|lamala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lamalathal|lamalathal]] || [[word:lamalajal|lamalajal]] || [[word:lamalashal|lamalashal]] || [[word:lamalakal|lamalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lamalathatha|lamalathatha]] || [[word:lamalajaja|lamalajaja]] || [[word:lamalashasha|lamalashasha]] || [[word:lamalaka|lamalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lamalathan|lamalathan]] || [[word:lamalajan|lamalajan]] || [[word:lamalashan|lamalashan]] || [[word:lamalakan|lamalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lamalathaoro|lamalathaoro]] || [[word:lamalajaoro|lamalajaoro]] || [[word:lamalashaoro|lamalashaoro]] || [[word:lamalakaoro|lamalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
